title: stellaria graminea var. latifolia
intro: Stellaria graminea var. latifolia, commonly known as broad-leaved lesser celandine, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Primulaceae family. It is a type of flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Stellaria graminea var. latifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
